name: herdr
title: Herdr
description: Control Herdr workspaces and coding agents from Raycast
author: vlades

commands.name: dashboard
commands.title: Dashboard
commands.subtitle: Herdr
commands.description: Browse and control Herdr workspaces, tabs, panes, and agents

commands.name: agents
commands.title: Manage Agents
commands.subtitle: Herdr
commands.description: Prompt, focus, inspect, rename, and control live coding agents

commands.name: prompt-agent
commands.title: Prompt Agent
commands.subtitle: Herdr
commands.description: Send a prompt to any live Herdr agent

commands.name: create-workspace
commands.title: Create Workspace
commands.subtitle: Herdr
commands.description: Create a Herdr workspace for a project

commands.name: create-worktree
commands.title: Create Git Worktree
commands.subtitle: Herdr
commands.description: Create a Git worktree and open it as a Herdr workspace

commands.name: start-agent
commands.title: Start Agent
commands.subtitle: Herdr
commands.description: Start an agent in a pane, split, tab, or workspace

commands.name: sessions
commands.title: Manage Sessions
commands.subtitle: Herdr
commands.description: Attach to, stop, and delete named Herdr sessions

commands.name: worktrees
commands.title: Manage Git Worktrees
commands.subtitle: Herdr
commands.description: Focus, create, close, and remove Herdr-managed Git worktrees

commands.name: plugins
commands.title: Manage Plugins
commands.subtitle: Herdr
commands.description: Invoke plugin actions and install, enable, disable, or remove Herdr plugins

commands.name: integrations
commands.title: Manage Agent Integrations
commands.subtitle: Herdr
commands.description: Install, update, and remove official Herdr agent integrations

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: Agent Status in Menu Bar
commands.description: Monitor and control Herdr agents from the menu bar

commands.name: open-herdr
commands.title: Open Herdr
commands.subtitle: Herdr
commands.description: Launch or attach to Herdr in your preferred terminal

commands.name: focus-attention
commands.title: Focus Agent Needing Attention
commands.subtitle: Herdr
commands.description: Jump to the first blocked or completed agent

commands.name: new-tab
commands.title: New Tab
commands.subtitle: Herdr
commands.description: Create and focus a tab in the active Herdr workspace

commands.name: split-right
commands.title: Split Pane Right
commands.subtitle: Herdr
commands.description: Split the active Herdr pane to the right

commands.name: split-down
commands.title: Split Pane Down
commands.subtitle: Herdr
commands.description: Split the active Herdr pane downward

commands.name: toggle-zoom
commands.title: Toggle Pane Zoom
commands.subtitle: Herdr
commands.description: Toggle zoom for the active Herdr pane

commands.name: focus-left
commands.title: Focus Pane Left
commands.subtitle: Herdr
commands.description: Focus the Herdr pane to the left

commands.name: focus-right
commands.title: Focus Pane Right
commands.subtitle: Herdr
commands.description: Focus the Herdr pane to the right

commands.name: focus-up
commands.title: Focus Pane Above
commands.subtitle: Herdr
commands.description: Focus the Herdr pane above

commands.name: focus-down
commands.title: Focus Pane Down
commands.subtitle: Herdr
commands.description: Focus the Herdr pane below

preferences.name: herdrPath
preferences.title: Herdr Binary
preferences.description: Optional absolute path to the Herdr binary. Leave empty to auto-detect it.

preferences.name: sessionName
preferences.title: Default Session
preferences.description: Named Herdr session to control. Leave empty for the default session.

preferences.name: terminalApplication
preferences.title: Terminal Application
preferences.description: Terminal application used when opening or attaching to Herdr.

preferences.name: customTerminalLauncher
preferences.title: Custom Terminal Launcher
preferences.description: Optional argument-safe launcher template for an unsupported terminal. Use {herdr} for the binary and {args} for Herdr arguments. This overrides automatic terminal handling.

preferences.name: refreshInterval
preferences.title: Refresh Interval
preferences.description: How often visible lists and the menu bar refresh.

preferences.name: outputLines
preferences.title: Output History
preferences.description: Number of recent terminal lines shown in Raycast.

preferences.name: terminalFocusBehavior
preferences.title: After Focusing
preferences.description: Show the selected resource in the configured terminal, or keep working in Raycast.

preferences.name: closeAfterPrompt
preferences.title: Prompt Behavior
preferences.description: Close Raycast after sending a prompt, so you can keep working immediately.
preferences.label: Close Raycast after sending a prompt

preferences.name: showIdleInMenuBar
preferences.title: Menu Bar
preferences.description: Keep the menu-bar icon visible when no agent needs attention.
preferences.label: Show while all agents are idle

scripts.check: npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run lint
